summary: Extract `fetchAllEFTSHits` shared pagination helper and route insider-cluster, restatements, and late-filers through it.
reason: restatements and late-filers each called `resp.Flatten()` on a single un-paginated EFTS response, silently capping results at the EFTS default of 10 hits per query. insider-cluster paginated correctly but kept its own inlined copy of the loop. One shared helper now drives all three and emits a truncation warning to stderr when totalAvailable exceeds what was fetched.
